title: Learnly: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Learnly puts expert-led courses, hands-on projects and progress tracking in one place, so you actually finish what you start.
Stop juggling videos, PDFs and notes. Learnly brings the whole journey from first lesson to finished skill together.
cards: Short, focused videos you can fit into any busy day.
Build real things and prove what you have learned.
Ask questions and get answers from people who teach for a living.
See streaks, milestones and exactly what comes next.
Earn shareable certificates the moment you complete a path.
Get the next course suggested for you, not for everyone.

sections.text: Follow a guided path that adapts to your level, sets clear milestones and keeps the next step always within reach.
Watching is not learning. Every course pairs lessons with practice, feedback and projects you can add to your portfolio.
bullets: A portfolio that grows as you go

sections.sub: No long setup, no credit card required.
steps: Tell us what you want to learn and where you are starting.
Move through lessons and projects at your own speed.
Finish the path, claim your certificate and apply it.

sections.quote: I went from zero to building my own app in two months with Learnly. The projects made everything click in a way videos alone never did.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you are ready to go further.

items: Is there really a free plan?
Yes. The Free plan gives you 50+ courses forever, no card required.
Pro and Teams plans include verified, shareable certificates for every path you complete.
You pay monthly or yearly and can cancel anytime, with no lock-in.
Can I learn at my own pace?
Absolutely. Courses are self-paced, so you can pause and pick up exactly where you left off.
Yes. The Teams plan adds dashboards, assigned paths and a dedicated manager.

sections.sub: Join millions of learners who turned spare moments into real, lasting skills.

sections.tagline: Expert-led courses, hands-on projects and progress tracking in one place. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Learnly is a sample template with dummy content
